title: June 11
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 11''' is the 162nd day of the year (163rd in leap years), with 203 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[Roger Kastel]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Sherman Howard]] is born.
*1949 – [[Steve Moore]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[John Tui]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Nick Kellington]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[John Wayne]] dies.
*[[2006]] – [[Tim Hildebrandt]] dies.
*[[2008]] – [[Rebellion 14|''Rebellion'' 14]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Timeline 8: The Jedi Civil War]]'' released on [http://www.swtor.com StarWarsTheOldRepublic.com].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Insider 142|''Star Wars Insider'' 142]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 18|''Star Wars'' (2013) 18]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Alphabet Squadron (novel)|''Alphabet Squadron'']] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Rendezvous at Bespin]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – "[[Battle Scars]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:Playstation 5|PlayStation 5]], Xbox Series S and [[Wikipedia:Xbox Series X and Series S|Xbox Series X/S]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[The High Republic: Temptation of the Force]]'' published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic: Temptation of the Force (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Temptation of the Force'' audiobook]] released.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Phase III Vol. 1 – Children of the Storm]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The Rebellion Omnibus Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2024 – [[Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi (TPB)|''Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi'' trade paperback]] published.
*2024 – "[[Destiny (The Acolyte)|Destiny]]" airs on Disney+.
*[[2025]] – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Ghost Agents 4|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Ghost Agents'' 4]] published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars (2025) 2|''Star Wars'' (2025) 2]] published.
*2025 – [[The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation 5|''The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation'' 5]] published.
<noinclude>
